page_metadata.biotools__summary: EPAD is an innovative position-specific distance-dependent statistical potential for protein structure and functional study. EPAD has different energy profiles for the same type of atom pairs, depending on their sequence positions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EPAD is an innovative position-specific distance-dependent statistical potential for protein structure and functional study. EPAD has different energy profiles for the same type of atom pairs, depending on their sequence positions.
